meaning: n.[鍖籡瀛愬鍐呰啘寮備綅
examples: Evidence from animal studies shows that endometriosis can result in central sensitization.
Surgical treatment is the preferred approach to infertile patients with advanced endometriosis.
Conclusions: Postmenopausal endometriosis was most likely the persistence of premenopausal endometriosis.
Women with chronic endometriosis will recognise this debilitating scenario as not imaginary, but very real.
Endometriosis occurs when tissue, which normally lines the uterus, is found elsewhere in the body.
